name: Odysseus
description: Odysseus is a self-hosted AI workspace. It bundles chat, web search via SearXNG, and a ChromaDB vector store so you can run your own private AI environment with the LLM provider of your choice.
longDescription: Odysseus is a self-hosted AI workspace. It bundles chat, web search via SearXNG, and a ChromaDB vector store so you can run your own private AI environment with the LLM provider of your choice.
